color.description: RGBA color `{r, g, b, a}` (0-1 range)

transform.description: Full 2D transform `{x, y, rotation, scaleX, scaleY}`

attributes.description: AttributeBundle — keyed Float32Array bundle for batch data (poses, bone transforms)

mat4Bundle.description: Per-element 4x4 transform bundle (for text character transforms)

attribute.description: Single attribute channel from a bundle

inputs.description: Nodes that read external signals into the graph: DOM events, mouse position, scroll progress, keyboard input, time, and other browser/device inputs.

constraints.description: Position, rotation, and transform constraints that enforce spatial relationships between objects: follow, aim, distance clamp, drag, path follow, camera bounds.

math.description: Pure compute nodes: remap ranges, math expressions, utility operations (abs, clamp, round), smoothing, parallax offset, velocity calculation, string operations.

boundary.description: Scene I/O boundary: read/write object transforms and properties, DOM CSS/attribute writes, color writes, stagger writes, data writes.

integration.description: Graph composition and data flow: ForEach stamping, scene composition, parameter store read/write, float/value sources.

animation.description: Core animation primitives: timelines for playback control, tweens for A→B interpolation, keyframes for multi-stop curves, and stagger for per-element timing.

text.description: Text animation nodes: split text into characters/words/lines, per-character wave/fade/spring/skew/distort transforms, coverage ranges for reveal effects.

paths.description: Path geometry read/write and modifiers: bend, wave, noise deform, trim, offset, boolean ops, wiggle path, round corners, repeater, conform, and more.

media.description: Media playback: audio tracks with RMS level output, Lottie animation control, DOM spritesheets, video sync, and WebGL video effects.

effects.description: Visual effects: WASM/GPU filter chains, parametric shape generation, glitch computation, FLIP layout animation, and morph path interpolation.

state-machine.description: State machine evaluation: layer advance, pose blending (linear, masked, weighted), object pose evaluation, and blend space nodes.

attributes.description: AttributeBundle operations: read/write named attributes from bundles, extract single values by property name and index.

skeleton.description: Bone and skeleton rigging: per-bone FK transforms, IK solvers, bone collectors, spring/jiggle bone physics, chain dynamics, and FK recomposition.

data.description: Data flow utilities: parameter actions (set, toggle, fire, increment), data source reads, and type casting between port types.

procedural.description: Time-driven procedural generators: wiggle, noise, oscillator, spring physics, modulate, ring delay, random values, and stagger drivers.

falloff.description: Spatial weight fields that modulate deformer strength: linear ramp, radial distance, shape boundary, fractal noise, element index, and user-defined curve.

distribution.description: Point distribution generators: grid, circle, linear, random, fibonacci spiral, path sampling. Feed into Generator node to create object clones.

solvers.description: Iterative solvers: value accumulation, mesh relaxation, distance constraint solving, rigid body physics (Planck.js/Box2D), and physics body readout.

bundles.description: Transform bundle infrastructure: time context, cycle clocks, and Mat4 transform bundle merge/mask operations.

scrollInput.description: Scroll progress (0-1) from page scroll position

distanceInput.description: Mouse distance to target (0 = at target, 1 = beyond radius)

dragInput.description: Boundary input: binds pointer events to a DOM element and maps drag offset to 0-1 progress on the configured axis. Supports parent-bounded range and inertia throw.

translationFollow.description: Constrain position to follow a source position

transformFollow.description: Copy transform components from source to target

autoOrient.description: Orient rotation based on movement velocity

cameraFollow.description: Smoothly follow target with deadzone and lookahead

cameraBounds.description: Clamp camera position and zoom to bounds

draggable.description: Enable drag interaction with optional axis lock and bounds

scroll.description: Scrollable container with bounds and momentum

scrollBar.description: Scroll bar indicator that tracks scroll position

pathFollow.description: Follow a path curve at given progress

remap.description: Map a value from one range to another with optional curve

converter.description: Value transformation (stringFormat, colorLerp, enumMap, conditional, math)

objectPosition.description: Read world position of a scene object

positionWrite.description: Write world-space position to a scene object

transformRead.description: Read full transform (position + rotation + scale) of a scene object

transformWrite.description: Write full transform to a scene object

propertyWrite.description: Write a float value to any object property

dataWrite.description: Write any-typed value to a canvas object property

domPropertyWrite.description: Write a float value to a CSS property, transform, attribute, or textContent on a DOM element

staggerWrite.description: Batched stagger animation — one node handles all elements matching a selector with per-element timing offset

scrollTrigger.description: Track element visibility during scroll — outputs progress, direction, velocity, and isInView

smoothing.description: Exponential smoothing for any float signal — frame-rate independent

gate.description: Blend a driven value toward a rest value under a 0..1 gate, with optional spring-smoothed threshold crossings

domDockTo.description: Compute additive translate that centers a source DOM element over a target element, scaled by a 0..1 blend. Wire outputs into a domPoseWrite translateX/translateY.

parameterWrite.description: Compute a parameter's next value on a rising-edge trigger. Pure-compute — reads currentValue from a ParameterStore.out_<paramId> input, emits nextValue which the store commits through its writer-fanin input.

boolTween.description: Smoothly tween a 0..1 progress toward a bool target over a fixed duration. Used to drive DOM animations from bool parameters (hover/click toggles). Emits linear progress so downstream multiKeyframe can carry the ease curve.

domIndexedDock.description: Dock a source element onto the Nth child of a list, where N is derived from a 0..1 progress input. Sibling to domDockTo (which docks onto a static target). Used for typewriter cursors, scanning highlights, focus rings, and any "park X on the active item in a sequence" effect.

scrollPin.description: Pin a DOM element to fixed position while scroll progress is within range

parallax.description: Convert scroll progress to parallax pixel offset

velocity.description: Compute smoothed rate-of-change of any float signal

domStringWrite.description: Write a string value to a DOM element (CSS, SVG attribute, textContent)

textSplit.description: Split text into chars/words/lines with glyph metrics for per-element animation

morphCompute.description: Pure SVG path interpolation — takes fromPath and toPath as string inputs, outputs interpolated path string. Zero DOM awareness.

scrambleCompute.description: Per-character scramble effect — outputs original or random character

pointer.description: Track pointer position — outputs x, y, normalized, isInside

observer.description: Detect gestures (wheel, touch, pointer, scroll) — outputs deltas

domSprite.description: Display spritesheet frame based on progress

lottie.description: Lottie animation — autoplay, scroll-driven, or state-controlled

flip.description: FLIP layout animation — triggered on rising edge

glitchCompute.description: Stateful random glitch — outputs offset, skew, and opacity

alongPathCompute.description: Follow an SVG path — outputs x, y, angle from pre-sampled LUT

timeline.description: Playback sequencer — self-advancing or externally driven (scroll, parameter)

seamlessPlayhead.description: Pure-math playhead for seamless infinite loops. Maps progress + iteration to a rawSequence-equivalent playhead time; slideOffset nudges playhead by one spacing-unit per step (keyboard / autoplay step).

domStagePreset.description: One-shot mount-time CSS writer: perspective / transformStyle on the stage, transformOrigin per slide. Used by the carousel mount-time setup.

carouselSlideLocalTime.description: Per-slide local-time for carousel tween semantics. slideProgress = clamp((playhead - slideIndex*spacing) mod loopDuration / duration, 0, 1).

carouselAutoplay.description: Time-driven slideOffset for carousel auto-advancement. Pauses on hover (optional) and respects prefers-reduced-motion.

carouselKeyboardNav.description: Edge-triggered ArrowLeft/ArrowRight → cumulative iteration offset. Wire into SeamlessPlayhead.iteration to enable keyboard slide stepping.

carouselWrapCounter.description: Half-plane wrap detection with cooldown + 3-sample direction majority. Emits cumulative iteration for seamless carousel loops.

tween.description: A→B interpolation with easing — stateless, pure function of progress

stagger.description: Per-element timing offset using Element Context (index, count)

colorTween.description: Perceptually uniform color interpolation in OKLab space

domColorWrite.description: Write rgb() color to a DOM element CSS property. F293 Phase 7: accepts a single color-typed input.

floatSource.description: Float value source — reads from connected input or set externally

parameterStoreRead.description: Read a float parameter from ParameterStore

parameterStoreWrite.description: Write a float value to ParameterStore

smPropertyApply.description: Signal node — SM property writes are done, downstream can read safely

poseEval.description: Evaluate animation clip bone tracks into a pose bundle (no mutation)

blendPose.description: Blend two pose bundles by weight (linear lerp)

maskedBlendPose.description: Blend two pose bundles with bone mask — unmasked bones pass through from A

animatedParameter.description: Sample a keyframe track at a progress input and drive a ParameterStoreNode writer port each frame. Joystick-input animation pattern — an autoplay clip keyframes a joystick parameter, which then seeks other clips.

additivePoseBlend.description: Combine N pose bundles by summing their deltas from a rest baseline — multi-clip stacking (autoplay plus parameter-seeked clips).

objectPoseEval.description: Evaluate animation clip object tracks into a pose bundle (x, y, rotation, scaleX, scaleY, opacity + extended props)

gradientDecompose.description: Decompose gradient/color FillValues into RGBA + per-stop float channels for the object pose bundle

propertyMask.description: Build per-property animated mask from raw transforms (reset-map pattern)

objectBlend.description: Blend two object pose bundles by weight (linear lerp)

objectMaskedBlend.description: Blend two object pose bundles with per-object mask — unmasked objects pass through from A

sceneTransform.description: Per-object transform — reads from objectPose bundle by index, computes world matrix, writes to HeadlessObject

bundleRead.description: Extract a single float from an AttributeBundle by property name + index

seekRemap.description: Map a raw parameter value into [0,1] progress for TimelinePoseNode / ObjectPoseEvalNode seek bindings

boneTransform.description: Per-bone FK node — reads pose at boneIndex, computes world matrix from parent

boneCollector.description: Gather per-bone world matrices into AttributeBundle for IK solver

skeletonTransform.description: Reads skeleton root transform each frame — feeds root bone parentWorldMatrix

eventListener.description: DOM event to graph signal (click, hover, etc.)

parameterAction.description: Compute parameter action (set, toggle, fire, increment, decrement)

keyboardListener.description: Keyboard key press/release to graph signal

attributeRead.description: Read a named attribute from an AttributeBundle

attributeWrite.description: Stamp a named attribute onto an AttributeBundle

textInput.description: Interactive text field with cursor and selection

audioTrack.description: Audio playback with level output for audio-reactive animations

spring.description: Damped spring physics — smooth follow with overshoot. Defaults to replace composition (spring IS the value).

oscillator.description: Periodic wave generator (sine, triangle, square, sawtooth)

modulate.description: Remap value through a piecewise-linear curve. Defaults to replace composition.

ring.description: Ring buffer delay — output a past value. Defaults to replace composition.

forEach.description: Stamp a preset per target object. Stamped nodes are read-only.

pathRead.description: Read path geometry from a scene object.

pathWrite.description: Write path geometry back to a scene object.

bend.description: Bend geometry around a center point.

pinch.description: Radial pinch or bloat from a center point.

trimPath.description: Output a sub-segment of a path by start/end position.

offsetPath.description: Inflate or deflate a path with cubic-preserving Tiller-Hanson offset.

linearFalloff.description: Ramp falloff along a configurable axis.

radialFalloff.description: Distance-based falloff from a center point.

indexFalloff.description: Element index mapping falloff (reads ForEachNode context).

curveFalloff.description: User-defined keyframe ramp. Input from upstream Float or element normalized.

boolean.description: Path boolean operations: union, subtract, intersect, exclude.

gridDistribution.description: Distribute points in a rows × cols grid centered at origin.

circleDistribution.description: Distribute points evenly around a circle.

linearDistribution.description: Distribute points along a line from start to end.

randomDistribution.description: Distribute points randomly in a bounding box (seeded PRNG).

pathDistribution.description: Distribute points along a path via arc-length sampling.

generator.description: Create display object clones at distribution positions. First node that creates visible shapes.

cloneSlot.description: Pre-declared clone slot for GeneratorNode. Gates clone visibility based on activeCount from generator.

valueSolver.description: Generic float accumulation with temporal feedback. Value moves toward target at given rate.

meshSolver.description: Iterative mesh relaxation. Averages vertex positions toward neighbors.

constraintSolver.description: Multi-pass distance constraint solving. Maintains rest lengths between connected points.

dataSource.description: Read a DataRecord field directly into the graph.

mathUtil.description: Typed Float→Float math operation (abs, round, clamp, normalize, add, etc.).

stringOp.description: Typed String→String operation (uppercase, trim, replace, template, etc.).

typeCast.description: Explicit AnyType → typed boundary (float, string, bool, color).

objectPropertyRead.description: Read a runtime object property (bidirectional binding read side).

physicsWorld.description: Rigid body physics simulation via Planck.js (Box2D). Lazy-loaded.

physicsBodyRead.description: Extract per-body x/y/rotation from PhysicsWorldNode output.

ikSolve.description: Per-chain IK solver. Pure array-based FABRIK on AttributeBundle data.

fkRecompose.description: Reads a post-IK/physics bone pose bundle and outputs per-bone world matrices via full parent×local FK. One per IK/physics skeleton, lives at scene level (outside rig Module) so only one bundle wire crosses the Module boundary.

sceneGraph.description: Composable scene root — encapsulates an entire .fmtion scene as a single node with promoted ports.

random.description: Seeded random value per frame. Uniform or gaussian distribution.

staggerDriver.description: Index-based wave propagation. Uses ForEach element context for per-instance offset.

jiggleBone.description: 2D position spring — adds bouncy displacement to bone x/y from parent movement.

springBonePhysics.description: Rotational spring — bone rotation follows parent with spring dynamics, gravity, and wind.

chainPhysics.description: Verlet chain simulation for hair, tails, ropes. Fixed timestep with distance/angular constraints.

roundCorners.description: Round sharp corners with cubic arcs.

chopPath.description: Split path into N visible segments with gaps.

waveDeformer.description: Sine wave displacement along path. Supports pulse mode.

repeater.description: N copies with cumulative transform offset.

conformToPath.description: Deform source to follow target path shape.

textWaveCompute.description: F256: Pure per-character wave sweep. Takes progress + upstream Mat4 bundle. schedulerPhase=pure, zero this.context access.

coverageRange.description: Per-character coverage window with falloff ramps. Animated offset via coverageTime keyframes. Chainable with blend modes.

coverageGroup.description: F256: Per-character transforms scaled by coverage values. Outputs Mat4TransformBundle.

textApply.description: Pure passthrough: forwards per-character Mat4 transforms to output port for SRN consumption. Follows SkinnedPathDeformNode pattern (F264).

meshDeform.description: Per-mesh LBS/DQS/morph/lattice deformation. Dynamic morph weight ports.

skinnedPathDeform.description: Per-path skinned bezier deformation with per-vertex bone weights.

layoutCompute.description: WASM flex layout recompute + animated transitions.

wasmEffect.description: Procedural noise/distortion texture generation via WASM.

parametricShape.description: WASM parametric shape generation with dynamic children.

maskSync.description: Mask transform synchronization — world-space mask geometry from source objects.

camera.description: 2D camera — zoom, pan, rotation, parallax, DOF, color effects, tint, vignette.

particleEmitter.description: Particle system — emit, advance, kill. Outputs per-particle data as AttributeBundle.

dirtyTrigger.description: External dirtying entry point. No-op evaluate — triggers downstream re-evaluation.

switchGate.description: Gates parentVisible for one child of a displayMode:switch group. Internal loader-generated node.

timelinePose.description: Evaluates animation clip bone tracks at current Timeline progress.

pathVertexAnim.description: Animates per-vertex offsets along a path over time.

timelineState.description: Animation state node — drives a TimelineNode from state machine layer events.

colorKeyframe.description: Multi-stop color interpolation in OKLab space — outputs r, g, b channels (0-255).

stringKeyframe.description: Multi-stop string interpolation — parses embedded numbers and interpolates each independently. For CSS strings (filter, boxShadow, gradients) where multiple numbers change together.

clipPath.description: Keyframed polygon clip-path with structured point data. Interpolates between polygon keyframe stops — outputs typed ClipPathPoints for visual per-point editing in FVE.

clipPathWrite.description: Serializes ClipPathPoints to CSS polygon() and writes to target element clip-path. Dirty-checks the serialized string to skip redundant DOM writes.

multiKeyframe.description: Multi-channel keyframe interpolation — one progress input, N float outputs with per-channel per-segment easing. Channels defined in params, output ports created dynamically.

domPoseWrite.description: Write multiple float values to CSS properties on a single DOM element. Transform components route through the accumulator, other properties go through DOMBatcher.

domAttributeRead.description: Reads a DOM/SVG attribute (e.g., d, viewBox, points) from an element at bind time and outputs it as a string. Static read — the boundary counterpart to DOMStringWriteNode.

splitText.description: Setup-only DOM text splitter — splits target element into spans (words/chars/lines).

counter.description: Animated number counter — interpolates min→max with formatting (decimals, separator, template).

hover.description: mouseenter/mouseleave with smooth 0→1 transition over duration.

distance.description: Mouse-to-element-rect proximity. Outputs 0 (far) to 1 (touching) with falloff.

textSequence.description: Cycles through a string array based on progress — outputs current text and index.

ikTarget.description: Boundary node — bridges scene-object position into IK solve target port.

remapApply.description: Side-effect node for nested artboard remap bindings — ordering anchor between SM writes and downstream coverage reads.

sceneRender.description: F232 renderer-agnostic scene boundary writer — draws all registered objects via Rust/WASM WebGL2.

boneRender.description: Editor-mode bone debug rendering — draws skeleton overlays in viewport.

additivePropertyWrite.description: F241 additive write boundary — sums multiple driver outputs into a single property without overwriting.

particleUpdate.description: Particle update boundary — advances particle state from emitter output each frame.

timeContext.description: Exposes scheduler ambient time (deltaTime, elapsed, frame) as output ports. Clock node — feed into CycleClock or directly into a time consumer.

cycleClock.description: Accumulates ambient scheduler deltaTime into a cycle progress [0, 1]. Drives time-dependent modifier compute nodes. Supports duration, iterations, ping-pong. No input ports — clock nodes read ambient time directly (F236).

transformBundleMerge.description: FR-1: Compose per-element transform bundles via matrix multiplication or alternative blend modes. Multi-connection input accepts N wires.

transformBundleMask.description: Apply a per-element transform bundle only to elements in [from, to] with optional edge falloff. Outside the range, elements pass through as identity.

textFadeCompute.description: Per-character opacity ramp with stagger. Geometry modifier — routes through TextApply via Mat4Bundle.

textSpringCompute.description: Per-character bouncy scale/offset via closed-form damped spring. Geometry modifier — routes through TextApply.

textScrambleApply.description: Per-character glyph swap from a pre-rasterized pool. F272: configurable pool, easing curves, per-char stagger + reveal mode.

textColorApply.description: Per-character fill color interpolation. Writes `piece.outputs.fill.set(lerpedColor)` via the F260 port-sourced rendering contract. Supports 4 reveal modes (linear, center-out, edges-in, random) + stagger control.

textStrokeApply.description: Per-character stroke color interpolation. Writes `piece.outputs.stroke.set(lerpedColor)` via the F260 port-sourced rendering contract.

textStrokeWidthApply.description: Per-character stroke width interpolation. Writes `piece.outputs.strokeWidth.set(lerped)` via the F260 port-sourced rendering contract.

textDrawLayerIndexApply.description: Per-character draw-order layering. Assigns a discrete layer index per character based on reveal order pattern + stride. Writes `piece.outputs.drawLayerIndex.set(layerIdx)` via the F260 port-sourced rendering contract.

instanceStaggerCompute.description: Per-instance staggered offset/scale animation. Proves Mat4 pipeline works for non-text domains.

instanceApply.description: F264 Phase 2: Writes Mat4TransformBundle per-instance transforms to GeneratorNode clone STNs via SceneTransformNode.setPose. Decomposes 4×4 → 2D pose per clone — full port contract flow, no imperative HeadlessObject mutation.

textEffectApply.description: Per-character blur/glow/shadow via the F260 port contract. Writes piece.outputs.blur/glow/shadow.set(v) per character using the perCharProgress stagger + reveal mode. The `effect` param selects which port to write.

scrollProgress.description: Outputs normalized scroll position [0, 1]. Drive text/instance animations from scroll.

mouseProgress.description: Outputs normalized mouse position [0, 1] relative to a target element or viewport.

keyframeProgress.description: Reads a parameter value and outputs it as progress. Wire from ParameterStoreNode or SM output for timeline-driven animations.

boneMat4Bundle.description: Gathers per-bone 2×3 world matrices from FK chain and promotes to Mat4TransformBundle for composable bone modifiers.

boneJiggleCompute.description: Per-bone secondary animation via closed-form damped spring. Composable with other bone modifiers via merge/mask.

textSkewCompute.description: Per-character horizontal shear with staggered decay. Geometry modifier — routes through TextApply.

textDistortCompute.description: Per-character random scatter/explosion entrance. Deterministic (seed-based). Geometry modifier — routes through TextApply.

smParameterStore.description: Declarative parameter store — one dynamic output port per SM parameter. Receives writes from listeners, drivers, and audio bindings.

layerAdvance.description: Per-layer state machine solver — evaluates conditions, advances transitions, outputs current/previous state progress and weights.

stateApply.description: Reads layer state from LayerAdvanceNode, sets animation clip progress and applies state evaluation.

blendSpace1DEval.description: F266 Phase 3: pure 1D blend space evaluator. Wraps evaluateBlend1DTransforms(). Inputs: inputValue (axis parameter), progress. Output: per-object transform map blended between adjacent animations.

blendDirectEval.description: F266 Phase 3: pure direct-blend evaluator. Wraps evaluateBlendDirectTransforms(). Per-animation weight inputs (weight_<id>) drive sequential blend-on-top. Weights from parameters use normalized scale (value/100, clamped 0..1).

blendSpace2DEval.description: F266 Phase 3: 2D blend space graph citizen. Serializable and inspectable in FVE. Evaluator stub — 2D blend transform output is still produced by BlendSpace2D.apply() pending extraction of a pure helper (Phase 6+).

resetMap.description: Applies animation reset maps during state transitions — properties animated by only one state get reset values during crossfade.

smHitTest.description: Translates pointer events + hit object IDs into per-target HitResult map for listener evaluation.

listenerAction.description: Routes listener actions into parameter writes (for SMParameterStoreNode) and side-effect actions (for audio/callback nodes).

smAudioAction.description: Terminal node for audio side effects — owns HTMLAudioElement cache, handles play/pause/stop actions.

smCallbackAction.description: Terminal node for stateless one-shot callbacks — dispatches switchCamera, setSkin, openUrl, fireEvent, animationAction.

smPostAdvance.description: Post-advance coordinator — trigger consumption, reset maps application, solver reset signal. Runs after all layers complete.

canvasPointer.description: Canvas-level pointer event source — outputs normalized pointer position, down/up flags, and hold state.

smAudioBinding.description: Reads frequency data from audio tracks, applies temporal smoothing, outputs parameter values for audio-reactive animations.

propertyAnimation.description: Animate one or more CSS properties on a target element, driven by a 0..1 progress input. Compound: expanded into `multiKeyframe + domPoseWrite` at load time — no runtime class.

clipPathAnimation.description: Animate a CSS polygon() clip-path on a target element, driven by a 0..1 progress input. Each keyframe carries `values[]` (the polygon point coordinates). Compound: expanded into `clipPath + clipPathWrite` at load time — no runtime class.

counterAnimation.description: Interpolate a number from min to max, format it, and write it as the textContent of a target element, driven by a 0..1 progress input. Compound: expanded into `counter + domPoseWrite` at load time — no runtime class.

textScrambleAnimation.description: Scramble a single character at a target selector — cycles through a charset and settles on the original character, driven by a 0..1 progress input. One compound per character (use one per DOM element; author a multiKeyframe to drive all of them from one scroll/hover source). Compound: expanded into `scrambleCompute + domStringWrite` at load time — no runtime class.
